description: Initializes the bus fetching routine ‘NXTBUS_2’ for retrieving buses in ascending numerical order. Hidden star point buses of three-winding transformers are excluded. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.2.0. ierr = inibus_2(ibus,msl,topo)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Starting bus number, 0 for first bus in ordered list. (input).

topo.description: exclude (i.e., for a bus with multiple sections, only one bus section is included).
include (i.e., for a bus with multiple sections, all bus sections are included).

error_codes.description: bus not found; ‘NXTBUS_2’ may not be used.
invalid MSL value; ‘NXTBUS_2’ may not be used.
invalid TOPO value; ‘NXTBUS_2’ may not be used.
